blended.narrative: Jay Peak is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,295 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
